content: Self-Refine’s iterative un supervised self-feedback loop can be restructured using the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to eliminate the blind spots that occur when a single LLM critiques its own output. This creates a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no additional training or labeled data, while addressing its key limitation of being trapped in the model’s inherent biased reasoning patterns.
